name_en: Factory leather with cashmere lining Lady Dior 3-Compartment Pearl Pink, the classic Diana bag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Exquisitely crafted with a visible quilting effect on the trellis pattern, the elegant and classic design is timeless. Adorned with a metallic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Mini style with a detachable chain shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, an ideal companion for evening wear. Detachable chain shoulder strap, can be paired with other embroidered straps as desired. Size: 17×15×7cm
